parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Animated
parameters.description: When true, the badge plays a one-shot pop-in entrance animation (scale + opacity) on mount. Default is false.

examples.title: Usage Examples
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Status</Lumeo.Text>
    <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Success">Active</Badge>
</Flex>
<Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Priority</Lumeo.Text>
    <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Destructive">High</Badge>
</Flex>

examples.title: In a Card
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Flex Align="center" Justify="between">
            <Heading Level="3" Size="lg">Notifications</Heading>
            <Badge>3 new</Badge>
        </Flex>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">You have unread messages.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
</Card>

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Badge

Small label for counts, statuses, or category tags.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/badge

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Badge | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Badge | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| Badge | Variant | `BadgeVariant` | `BadgeVariant.Default` |  |
| Badge | IsDot | `bool` | `` |  |
| Badge | Pulse | `bool` | `` |  |
| Badge | IsRemovable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Badge | OnRemove | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Badge | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, the badge plays a one-shot pop-in entrance animation (scale + opacity) on mount. Default is false. |
| Badge | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Badge | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Badge) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (Badge) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `OnRemove` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Badge />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Badge/Badge.razor`
